metadata.name: Fusion Launcher Scraper Test Library
metadata.license: Catalog metadata only. No ROMs, BIOS, firmware, or keys are distributed. Import your own legally obtained game files.

catalog.title: Nebula Quest
catalog.description: Fictional user-provided NES entry used to exercise CRC32 hash matching and fallback metadata flows.

downloads.instructions: Import your own legally obtained Nebula Quest .nes cartridge image.
